examples: You see it in the weatherworn stones of turreted castles.
He pointed to the turreted nunnery that could be seen on the mountainside.
Its eyes are turreted and can be moved independently so that it can view two different objects simultaneously!
He fled to his turreted home in Salt Lake City to lick his wounds.
The Liebieghaus, a turreted villa on the south bank of the Main, is the perfect setting for this compact show.
